summary: Tested Firebase Push Notifications, Smart Recommendations, and Gift System features. All 32 backend tests PASSED. Frontend components verified: RecommendedProducts section visible on homepage with tabs (رائج الآن, عروض), Gift button visible on product detail page for logged-in users, GiftModal opens correctly with all fields.
critical_code_review_comments: FCM Token APIs working correctly: POST/DELETE /api/notifications/fcm-token
Push Test API returns 400 when no FCM token registered (expected behavior)
Push Stats API properly restricted to admin users only (403 for non-admin)
RecommendedProducts component renders on homepage with tab navigation
GiftModal component shows all required fields: recipient name, phone, message, anonymous option
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested. Firebase Push Notifications require actual FCM token from browser to fully test push/test endpoint. Recommendations endpoints return empty arrays when no matching data (trending needs product_views, deals needs products with discount_percent > 0). Gift system working end-to-end.

notifications_fcm_token_save.details: Successfully saves FCM token for authenticated users

notifications_push_test.details: Returns 400 when no FCM token registered (expected), requires actual token

notifications_push_stats.details: Admin-only endpoint returns token count and recent logs

notifications_push_send.details: Admin-only endpoint for sending push notifications

recommendations_trending.details: Public endpoint returns trending products (empty if no views data)

gifts_sent.details: Returns list of gifts sent by user

gifts_received.details: Returns list of gifts received by user

homepage_recommendations_section.details: Section visible with 'توصيات لك' header and tabs (رائج الآن, عروض)

product_detail_gift_button.details: Button with data-testid='gift-btn' visible for logged-in users

gift_modal.details: Modal opens with recipient name, phone, message fields and anonymous option
